text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, July 10. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Updating our financial spreadsheets. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Smart financial planning. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. That sounds critical. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. Great update. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I checked the telemetry feeds. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /appointment/notify under load. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Understood. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /appointment/notify. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. That's good medical feedback. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reviewing our household budget today. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Refinancing is a great leverage point. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need patient onboarding immediately. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. That sounds critical. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. That's wonderful. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Our Twilio integration is throwing 429 rate limit errors during signups. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Understood. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! Great consistency with running. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Made good progress on my work tasks today. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
